purpose: Full original repo plus safe NexoWatt EOS frontend/login branding and compiled admin runtime assets.
name: NexoWatt EOS full repository package - UI/performance refined v5
v4Changes: Login title changed from Energy Management System wording to NexoWatt EOS / Energy Operation System.
Top bar, drawer and module cards restyled with floating EOS shell.
Direct logout button injected into the top right toolbar.
User/rights helper and permission preset overlay added.
Runtime assets validated to avoid missing asset black screen.
v5Changes: Login title/motto hardened to NexoWatt EOS / Energy Operation System.
Topbar made responsive; direct logout moved into a fixed visible top-right action with safe spacing.
Drawer uses native header area for the NexoWatt EOS logo and gets vertical scrolling for future menu growth.
Adapter/module card headers restyled away from blue bars and rounded more consistently.
Runtime branding script optimized: no permanent interval, no class-attribute observer, patches added scopes instead of rescanning whole DOM every 1.5s.
Expensive global icon filters/backdrop filters reduced for faster adapter-page rendering.
